title: DKLOJAPLAYER
description: DKLojaPlayer is the ultimate shop system plugin for Minecraft 1.21.1, allowing server admins to create powerful, customizable shops with an easy-to-use GUI and support for various economy systems.
body:
DKLojaPlayer is a complete shop system plugin for Minecraft 1.21.1 servers. This plugin allows administrators to create fully customizable shops with an intuitive graphical interface (GUI), supporting multiple economy systems including a unique dual-currency system.

**Main command**:
```
/dklojaplayer <action> <shop_name>
```

**Required permissions**:
```
dklojaplayer.admin
dklojaplayer.use
```

**Optional Dependencies**:
- **Vault**: For money-based economy systems
- **PlayerPoints**: For point-based economy systems

Note: At least one of these dependencies must be installed for the plugin to work fully.

## 🌟 Key Features

### 💎 Dual Currency System (BOTH)
- **Flexible payment options**: Shops can accept Vault (money) OR PlayerPoints (points)
- **Per-item configuration**: In BOTH shops, each item can be set to:
  - Accept only Vault
  - Accept only PlayerPoints
  - Accept both currencies (player pays with whichever they have)
- **Smart payment detection**: Automatically detects which currency the player has available

### 🏪 Shop Types
- **BUY shops**: Players purchase items from the shop
- **SELL shops**: Players sell items to the shop
- **Currency options**: Vault, PlayerPoints, BOTH, or Item Trade
- **Decorative items**: Add non-purchasable items for shop decoration

### 🎨 Intuitive GUI System
- Easy shop creation and editing through graphical interface
- Right-click items to configure individual currency settings
- Visual feedback with color-coded buttons
- Support for item packs and bulk purchases

### 🌍 Multi-language Support
- Portuguese (BR) and English translations included
- Configurable default language in config.yml

### ⚙️ Advanced Configuration
- Stock management (limited or infinite)
- Owner payment system
- Sale notifications
- Permission-based shop creation controls
- Debug mode for troubleshooting
